title: How To Cut Bottles With Our Ink And A Microwave
description: Another fun  little idea on things to do with our conductive ink - Make drinking glasses out of beer bottles, vases out of wine bottles....whatever! To buy the conductive ink, our Bright Zinc, Copper or Nickel no cyanide all in one electroplating solutions or materials for your own experiments, go to www.workingink.co.uk.
